description: You are an AV technician at a public planetarium preparing a NASA spatial video of the Mars Rover (/home/ga/Videos/mars_rover_hsbs.mp4, 1920x1080 HSBS 3D) for three museum exhibits. Produce a Lobby Display version at /home/ga/Videos/exhibits/lobby_2d.mp4 by extracting the Left eye scaled to 1920x1080 with audio. Produce a Dome Projector version at /home/ga/Videos/exhibits/dome_right.mp4 by extracting the Right eye scaled to 1920x1080 without audio. Produce a Classroom Anaglyph version at /home/ga/Videos/exhibits/classroom_anaglyph.mp4 as a Red/Cyan composite at 1920x1080 with audio. Document all three versions in a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Documents/spatial_manifest.json containing a 'deliverables' array of objects with keys 'filename', 'resolution', 'has_audio', and '3d_format' (using 'monoscopic' or 'anaglyph').
